title: lepidocoma vestita
intro: Lepidocoma vestita is a species of flowering plant in the family Tiliaceae, commonly known as the velvet-back tree or velvet tree. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lepidocoma vestita include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Lepidocoma vestita can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it has also been used in the form of a paste or ointment for topical applications.
